Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class PartyLegalNaturalPerson

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.PartyLegalNaturalPerson
public class PartyLegalNaturalPerson extends Object
PartyLegalNaturalPerson - Legal natural person.

    static final PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder
    builder()
     
    Optional<List<String>>
    citizenshipCountries()
    This is used for tax (treaty) and country block list considerations Maximum list of two 2-char CLDR Code citizenship countries, e.g.
    Optional<String>
    controlPersonCompanySymbols()
    A list of ticker symbols in which the underlying person is a control person; control persons are defined as having significant influence over a company’s management and operations, typically through ownership of a large percentage of the company’s voting stock or through positions on the company’s board of directors or executive team
    Optional<Boolean>
    correspondentEmployee()
    Indicates the related owner record is an employee of the clearing broker's correspondent customer.
    Optional<String>
    correspondentId()
    A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.
    Optional<Boolean>
    custodianEmployee()
    A flag to indicate whether this person is an employee of the correspondent.
    Optional<String>
    customerIdentificationId()
    Customer identification id returned by the customer identification service which represents a single instance of an identity verification outcome for the specified customer.

    doingBusinessAs()
    DBA (Doing Business As) names.

    Object containing information pertaining to a investor's current employer including the name, address, and duration of employment.

    The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.

    Indicates if the person is recognized as a "Large Trader" by the SEC.
    Optional<String>
    legalNaturalPersonId()
    A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single natural person; Used to access the record after creation.
    Optional<PartyMaritalStatus>
    maritalStatus()
    The legal marital status of an account-holder; Used in combination with state of domicile to determine qualification for account types and beneficiary exclusion rules.
    Optional<String>
    middleNames()
    Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.
    Optional<String>
    name()
    The name field Format: legalNaturalPersons/{legalNaturalPerson}
    Optional<PartyNameSuffix>
    nameSuffix()
    The suffix of a natural person; A suffix in a name is any part of the name that comes after the last name

    naturalPersonFdd()
    Foreign Due Diligence (FDD) information for Legal Natural Person

  • Method Details

    • accreditedInvestor

      public Optional<Boolean> accreditedInvestor()
      Indicates whether the person is an accredited investor

    • adviser

      public Optional<Boolean> adviser()
      Indicates whether the person is an adviser

    • birthDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyBirthDate> birthDate()
      The legal day, month, and year of birth for a natural person.

    • citizenshipCountries

      public Optional<List<String>> citizenshipCountries()
      This is used for tax (treaty) and country block list considerations Maximum list of two 2-char CLDR Code citizenship countries, e.g. US, CA

    • controlPersonCompanySymbols

      public Optional<String> controlPersonCompanySymbols()
      A list of ticker symbols in which the underlying person is a control person; control persons are defined as having significant influence over a company’s management and operations, typically through ownership of a large percentage of the company’s voting stock or through positions on the company’s board of directors or executive team

    • correspondentEmployee

      public Optional<Boolean> correspondentEmployee()
      Indicates the related owner record is an employee of the clearing broker's correspondent customer.

    • correspondentId

      public Optional<String> correspondentId()
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.

    • custodianEmployee

      public Optional<Boolean> custodianEmployee()
      A flag to indicate whether this person is an employee of the correspondent.

    • customerIdentificationId

      public Optional<String> customerIdentificationId()
      Customer identification id returned by the customer identification service which represents a single instance of an identity verification outcome for the specified customer. This verification result will be used as part of the full investigation.

    • deathDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyDeathDate> deathDate()
      The day, month, and year of death of a legal natural person

    • doingBusinessAs

      public Optional<List<String>> doingBusinessAs()
      DBA (Doing Business As) names. Can list up to 5 associated with the Legal Natural Person

    • employment

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyEmployment> employment()
      Object containing information pertaining to a investor's current employer including the name, address, and duration of employment.

    • familyName

      public Optional<String> familyName()
      Family name of a natural person.

    • finraAssociatedEntity

      public Optional<String> finraAssociatedEntity()
      The name of the FINRA-associated entity the underlying natural person is affiliated with.

    • foreignIdentification

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyForeignIdentification> foreignIdentification()
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `irs_form_type` is `W_8BEN`.

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • givenName

      public Optional<String> givenName()
      The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.

    • globalPersonId

      public Optional<String> globalPersonId()
      Globally Unique identifier for a legal natural person

    • identityVerificationResult

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyIdentityVerificationResult> identityVerificationResult()
      Third-party data result used to verify the identity of an introduced investor. If the client identity_verification_model is PROVIDED_BY_CLIENT, this field is required

    • institutionalCustomer

      public Optional<Boolean> institutionalCustomer()
      Indicates whether the person is an institutional customer

    • investigationId

      public Optional<String> investigationId()
      Investigation id relating a comprehensive investigation for a customer, encompassing the aggregation of identity verification results and watchlist screenings, conducted to support the Customer Identification Program (CIP) and Customer Due Diligence (CDD)

    • largeTrader

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyLegalNaturalPersonLargeTrader> largeTrader()
      Indicates if the person is recognized as a "Large Trader" by the SEC.

    • legalNaturalPersonId

      public Optional<String> legalNaturalPersonId()
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single natural person; Used to access the record after creation.

    • maritalStatus

      public Optional<PartyMaritalStatus> maritalStatus()
      The legal marital status of an account-holder; Used in combination with state of domicile to determine qualification for account types and beneficiary exclusion rules.

    • middleNames

      public Optional<String> middleNames()
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The name field Format: legalNaturalPersons/{legalNaturalPerson}

    • nameSuffix

      public Optional<PartyNameSuffix> nameSuffix()
      The suffix of a natural person; A suffix in a name is any part of the name that comes after the last name

    • naturalPersonFdd

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyNaturalPersonFdd> naturalPersonFdd()
      Foreign Due Diligence (FDD) information for Legal Natural Person

    • nonCitizenResidency

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyNonCitizenResidency> nonCitizenResidency()
      Facilitates non-citizen lawful US residents to open domestic accounts

    • personalAddress

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyPersonalAddress> personalAddress()
      The legal street number and street name for an account Party. Required fields within the `personal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • politicallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames

      public Optional<List<String>> politicallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames()
      A Party's self-disclosed list of names representing family members who are politically exposed.

    • politicallyExposedOrganization

      public Optional<String> politicallyExposedOrganization()
      A Party's self-disclosed list of named politically exposed organizations they are personally associated with.

    • taxId

      public Optional<String> taxId()
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related person; Must be provided with `ITIN` or `SSN` tax ID type

    • taxIdLastFour

      public Optional<String> taxIdLastFour()
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.

    • taxIdType

      public Optional<PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxIdType> taxIdType()
      The nature of the U.S. Tax ID indicated in the related tax_id field; Examples include ITIN, SSN, EIN.

    • taxProfile

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PartyLegalNaturalPersonTaxProfile> taxProfile()
      Tax-related attributes at the for the account; A tax profile with taxpayer attributes is located on the legal_natural_person or legal_entity objects elsewhere on the account record.

    • builder

      public static final PartyLegalNaturalPerson.Builder builder()

    • withAccreditedInvestor

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withAccreditedInvestor(boolean accreditedInvestor)
      Indicates whether the person is an accredited investor

    • withAccreditedInvestor

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withAccreditedInvestor(Optional<Boolean> accreditedInvestor)
      Indicates whether the person is an accredited investor

    • withAdviser

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withAdviser(boolean adviser)
      Indicates whether the person is an adviser

    • withAdviser

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withAdviser(Optional<Boolean> adviser)
      Indicates whether the person is an adviser

    • withBirthDate

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withBirthDate(PartyBirthDate birthDate)
      The legal day, month, and year of birth for a natural person.

    • withBirthDate

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withBirthDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyBirthDate> birthDate)
      The legal day, month, and year of birth for a natural person.

    • withCitizenshipCountries

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCitizenshipCountries(List<String> citizenshipCountries)
      This is used for tax (treaty) and country block list considerations Maximum list of two 2-char CLDR Code citizenship countries, e.g. US, CA

    • withCitizenshipCountries

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCitizenshipCountries(Optional<? extends List<String>> citizenshipCountries)
      This is used for tax (treaty) and country block list considerations Maximum list of two 2-char CLDR Code citizenship countries, e.g. US, CA

    • withControlPersonCompanySymbols

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withControlPersonCompanySymbols(String controlPersonCompanySymbols)
      A list of ticker symbols in which the underlying person is a control person; control persons are defined as having significant influence over a company’s management and operations, typically through ownership of a large percentage of the company’s voting stock or through positions on the company’s board of directors or executive team

    • withControlPersonCompanySymbols

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withControlPersonCompanySymbols(Optional<String> controlPersonCompanySymbols)
      A list of ticker symbols in which the underlying person is a control person; control persons are defined as having significant influence over a company’s management and operations, typically through ownership of a large percentage of the company’s voting stock or through positions on the company’s board of directors or executive team

    • withCorrespondentEmployee

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCorrespondentEmployee(boolean correspondentEmployee)
      Indicates the related owner record is an employee of the clearing broker's correspondent customer.

    • withCorrespondentEmployee

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCorrespondentEmployee(Optional<Boolean> correspondentEmployee)
      Indicates the related owner record is an employee of the clearing broker's correspondent customer.

    • withCorrespondentId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCorrespondentId(String correspondentId)
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.

    • withCorrespondentId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCorrespondentId(Optional<String> correspondentId)
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent; A Client may have several operating Correspondents within its purview.

    • withCustodianEmployee

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCustodianEmployee(boolean custodianEmployee)
      A flag to indicate whether this person is an employee of the correspondent.

    • withCustodianEmployee

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCustodianEmployee(Optional<Boolean> custodianEmployee)
      A flag to indicate whether this person is an employee of the correspondent.

    • withCustomerIdentificationId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCustomerIdentificationId(String customerIdentificationId)
      Customer identification id returned by the customer identification service which represents a single instance of an identity verification outcome for the specified customer. This verification result will be used as part of the full investigation.

    • withCustomerIdentificationId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withCustomerIdentificationId(Optional<String> customerIdentificationId)
      Customer identification id returned by the customer identification service which represents a single instance of an identity verification outcome for the specified customer. This verification result will be used as part of the full investigation.

    • withDeathDate

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withDeathDate(PartyDeathDate deathDate)
      The day, month, and year of death of a legal natural person

    • withDeathDate

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withDeathDate(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyDeathDate> deathDate)
      The day, month, and year of death of a legal natural person

    • withDoingBusinessAs

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withDoingBusinessAs(List<String> doingBusinessAs)
      DBA (Doing Business As) names. Can list up to 5 associated with the Legal Natural Person

    • withDoingBusinessAs

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withDoingBusinessAs(Optional<? extends List<String>> doingBusinessAs)
      DBA (Doing Business As) names. Can list up to 5 associated with the Legal Natural Person

    • withEmployment

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withEmployment(PartyEmployment employment)
      Object containing information pertaining to a investor's current employer including the name, address, and duration of employment.

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withFinraAssociatedEntity(String finraAssociatedEntity)

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withFinraAssociatedEntity(Optional<String> finraAssociatedEntity)
      The name of the FINRA-associated entity the underlying natural person is affiliated with.

    • withForeignIdentification

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withForeignIdentification(PartyForeignIdentification foreignIdentification)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `irs_form_type` is `W_8BEN`.

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • withForeignIdentification

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withForeignIdentification(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyForeignIdentification> foreignIdentification)
      **Field Dependencies:**

      Required if `irs_form_type` is `W_8BEN`.

      Otherwise, must be empty.

    • withGivenName

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withGivenName(String givenName)
      The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.

    • withGivenName

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withGivenName(Optional<String> givenName)
      The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.

      Globally Unique identifier for a legal natural person

      Globally Unique identifier for a legal natural person

    • withIdentityVerificationResult

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withIdentityVerificationResult(PartyIdentityVerificationResult identityVerificationResult)
      Third-party data result used to verify the identity of an introduced investor. If the client identity_verification_model is PROVIDED_BY_CLIENT, this field is required

    • withIdentityVerificationResult

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withIdentityVerificationResult(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyIdentityVerificationResult> identityVerificationResult)
      Third-party data result used to verify the identity of an introduced investor. If the client identity_verification_model is PROVIDED_BY_CLIENT, this field is required

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withInstitutionalCustomer(boolean institutionalCustomer)
      Indicates whether the person is an institutional customer

    • withInstitutionalCustomer

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withInstitutionalCustomer(Optional<Boolean> institutionalCustomer)
      Indicates whether the person is an institutional customer

    • withInvestigationId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withInvestigationId(String investigationId)
      Investigation id relating a comprehensive investigation for a customer, encompassing the aggregation of identity verification results and watchlist screenings, conducted to support the Customer Identification Program (CIP) and Customer Due Diligence (CDD)

    • withInvestigationId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withInvestigationId(Optional<String> investigationId)
      Investigation id relating a comprehensive investigation for a customer, encompassing the aggregation of identity verification results and watchlist screenings, conducted to support the Customer Identification Program (CIP) and Customer Due Diligence (CDD)

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withLargeTrader(PartyLegalNaturalPersonLargeTrader largeTrader)
      Indicates if the person is recognized as a "Large Trader" by the SEC.

    • withLargeTrader

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withLargeTrader(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyLegalNaturalPersonLargeTrader> largeTrader)
      Indicates if the person is recognized as a "Large Trader" by the SEC.

    • withLegalNaturalPersonId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withLegalNaturalPersonId(String legalNaturalPersonId)
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single natural person; Used to access the record after creation.

    • withLegalNaturalPersonId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withLegalNaturalPersonId(Optional<String> legalNaturalPersonId)
      A system-generated unique identifier referencing a single natural person; Used to access the record after creation.

    • withMaritalStatus

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withMaritalStatus(PartyMaritalStatus maritalStatus)
      The legal marital status of an account-holder; Used in combination with state of domicile to determine qualification for account types and beneficiary exclusion rules.

    • withMaritalStatus

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withMaritalStatus(Optional<? extends PartyMaritalStatus> maritalStatus)
      The legal marital status of an account-holder; Used in combination with state of domicile to determine qualification for account types and beneficiary exclusion rules.

    • withMiddleNames

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withMiddleNames(String middleNames)
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

    • withMiddleNames

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withMiddleNames(Optional<String> middleNames)
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

    • withName

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withName(String name)
      The name field Format: legalNaturalPersons/{legalNaturalPerson}

    • withName

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withName(Optional<String> name)
      The name field Format: legalNaturalPersons/{legalNaturalPerson}

    • withNameSuffix

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withNameSuffix(PartyNameSuffix nameSuffix)
      The suffix of a natural person; A suffix in a name is any part of the name that comes after the last name

    • withNameSuffix

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withNameSuffix(Optional<? extends PartyNameSuffix> nameSuffix)
      The suffix of a natural person; A suffix in a name is any part of the name that comes after the last name

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withNonCitizenResidency(PartyNonCitizenResidency nonCitizenResidency)

    • withPersonalAddress

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withPersonalAddress(PartyPersonalAddress personalAddress)
      The legal street number and street name for an account Party. Required fields within the `personal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • withPersonalAddress

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withPersonalAddress(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PartyPersonalAddress> personalAddress)
      The legal street number and street name for an account Party. Required fields within the `personal_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withPoliticallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames(List<String> politicallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames)

    • withPoliticallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withPoliticallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames(Optional<? extends List<String>> politicallyExposedImmediateFamilyNames)
      A Party's self-disclosed list of names representing family members who are politically exposed.

    • withPoliticallyExposedOrganization

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withPoliticallyExposedOrganization(String politicallyExposedOrganization)

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withPoliticallyExposedOrganization(Optional<String> politicallyExposedOrganization)
      A Party's self-disclosed list of named politically exposed organizations they are personally associated with.

    • withTaxId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withTaxId(String taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related person; Must be provided with `ITIN` or `SSN` tax ID type

    • withTaxId

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withTaxId(Optional<String> taxId)
      The full U.S. tax ID for a related person; Must be provided with `ITIN` or `SSN` tax ID type

    • withTaxIdLastFour

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withTaxIdLastFour(String taxIdLastFour)
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.

    • withTaxIdLastFour

      public PartyLegalNaturalPerson withTaxIdLastFour(Optional<String> taxIdLastFour)
      The last four characters of the related person's tax identifier; Masked/truncated to "last four" in most usage contexts to preserve data privacy.
